creator: michelle@sorbs.net
text: It does, not going to bother with this anymore though now.  Got better things to do with my life than chase down bugs a year after notification on an OS that I am migrating away from because of these very 'obsolete version' closure of bugs.  I will however tell you it's how its setup that causes the issue, don't remember how I did it because I'm unable to get it setup in the same way again.
